channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Unknown languages (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Unknown languages nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📜 DietrichGebert/ponytail (80254 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: DietrichGebert

📝 Repository: DietrichGebert/ponytail

📄 Descrizione: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

⭐ Stelle: 80254

🍴 Forks: 4324

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agents claude claude-code claude-code-plugin cursor-rules developer-tools llm prompt-engineering yagni

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T00:52:37Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-11T04:58:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐍 omnigent-ai/omnigent (6938 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: omnigent-ai

📝 Repository: omnigent-ai/omnigent

📄 Descrizione: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.

🍴 Forks: 936

💻 Linguaggio: Python

item.description:
👤 Owner: cobusgreyling

📝 Repository: cobusgreyling/loop-engineering

📄 Descrizione: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.

🍴 Forks: 826

item.title: 🐍 bikini/exploitarium (3885 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: bikini

📝 Repository: bikini/exploitarium

📄 Descrizione: A single archive of public exploit PoCs and vulnerability research writeups. At the time I post these, none have been reported. Feel free to report them yourself and take credit for the CVE if handed out lulz. Please do not abuse these. I do this so to allure people into the field, and I've always found this is the most efficient way.

⭐ Stelle: 3885

🍴 Forks: 1114

💻 Linguaggio: Python

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-23T05:14:11Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-13T05:33:42Z

]]>

item.title: 🟦 shy3130/tickflow-stock-panel (2059 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shy3130

📝 Repository: shy3130/tickflow-stock-panel

📄 Descrizione: 自托管、零运维的 A 股「选股 + 监控 + 回测」量化工作台 | 基于 TickFlow 数据源 | LLM能力驱使策略定制+个股分析+复盘 | 自由接入第三方数据源与个性化扩展数据 | 个人开源 ,非TickFlow官方项目

⭐ Stelle: 2059

🍴 Forks: 437

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: a-stock ai-agent aigc backtesting daily duckdb fastapi llm polars quant quantitative-finance quantitative-trading react screener self-hosted stock stock-analysis tdx tickflow

item.title: 🟦 tigicion/dao-code (1610 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tigicion

📝 Repository: tigicion/dao-code

📄 Descrizione: Open-source TypeScript terminal coding agent for DeepSeek-V4 — builds on DeepSeek's strong price-performance and ultra-cheap cache pricing, engineering byte-stable prefixes and cache-reusing forks so cross-session memory and a continuous self-correction layer add almost no token cost; 1M context, Skills/MCP/Hooks, Claude Code config compatible.

⭐ Stelle: 1610

🍴 Forks: 54

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent cli coding-agent deepseek llm terminal typescript

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-08T08:10:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-07T01:54:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
